            ),

        if len(resolved_source_list.sources) == 0:

        source_blocks = []

                if source.source_identifier not in channels and len(channels) > 0:
                    channel_choice = query_ai_assistant(
                        "Select the exact existing Slack channel from the available channel list that best matches the referenced channel. "

                        ),
                        ChannelChoice,
                    )
                    if channel_choice.channel in channels:

                channel_messages = read_channel_messages(resolved_source_channel)

                        source.source_identifier,
                        resolved_source_channel,
                        repr(channel_messages),

            elif source.source_type == "inbox":
                inbox_messages = read_inbox(source.source_identifier)
                source_blocks = source_blocks + [
                    "Source type: inbox\nUser: {}\nSource data:\n{}".format(
                        source.source_identifier,

                source_blocks = source_blocks + [
